meta.description: TASK-108 · Receives error payloads from any Bylda workflow or edge function, classifies severity, logs to Supabase, and routes to the appropriate alert channel (Slack, email, or silent-log) based on severity and error type.

parameters.jsCode:
const err = $('Parse & Classify Error').item.json;
return [{ json: { logged: true, severity: err.severity, silent: true, source: err.source } }];
